creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Ok... please forgive me, but I am relatively new to BSD but have been getting along pretty well for the last several months (until this).  And have updated gstreamer before without issue - so, I am a little lost here.

Here's what I did:

package delete which completed successfully.

checked package info which showed the package as "missing"??

Installed again and got the same error as during the update.

I also tried the commands suggested and got the same failure:

% pkg delete -f gstreamer1-plugins-bad-1.12.3_2
% portmaster -C gstreamer1 gstreamer1-plugins-bad
